design_system.name: The Onyx Standard
design_system.description: A premium, compliance-first design system for LaunchPath. Evokes the authority of a high-end law firm and the precision of a top-tier SaaS security platform. Dark, minimalist, and rigorous.

brand_identity.voice: Calm, Confident, Direct. No marketing fluff. 'Admission is limited.'
brand_identity.visual_metaphor: A lit office in a dark skyscraper at night. Serious business happens here.

usage_rules: Never use gradients for main backgrounds. Use deep solid colors with subtle noise/grain.
Gold (#D4AF37) is the 'Action' color. Use it for Primary Buttons and Key Highlights only.
Red is RESTRICTED. Use it ONLY for FMCSA penalties and financial loss data.
Blue is for 'Tech/System' indicators (e.g. 'System Active', 'Data Encrypted').
Do not use the old gold (#c8963e) as a status light. It is a brand accent only.

scale.caption: text-sm text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-widest
scale.code: font-mono text-sm text-sky-400 bg-slate-900/50 px-1 py-0.5 rounded

rules: Use 'Manrope' for all Headings (H1-H6). It bridges the gap between 'Tech' and 'Human'.
Use 'Inter' for all body text and UI elements (inputs, tooltips).
Use 'JetBrains Mono' STRICTLY for: DOT Numbers, MC Numbers, CFR Codes, Prices, and Date/Time stamps.
Avoid 'IBM Plex Mono' for general labels. It looks too 'terminal'.
Headings should generally be White (#fff). Body text should be Slate-300 or Slate-400. Never pure gray (#808080).
Mobile First: Stack everything on mobile.
Use 'Generous Spacing'. If it feels empty, it's correct. Luxury = Space.
Grid gaps should be large (32px / gap-8) to separate 'Legal Brief' sections.
Do not use 100% width on large screens. constrain content to max-w-7xl.

Card.style: bg-slate-900/40 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/5 hover:border-gold/20 transition-all duration-300

Button.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wider px-8 py-4 rounded-none hover:bg-white hover:text-black transition-colors duration-300 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(212,175,55,0.2)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(212,175,55,0.4)]
Button.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white uppercase tracking-wider px-8 py-4 rounded-none hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors duration-300
Button.ghost: text-slate-400 hover:text-[#D4AF37] uppercase tracking-widest text-sm font-semibold transition-colors

Input.style: bg-black/40 border border-white/10 text-white p-4 rounded-none focus:border-[#D4AF37] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#D4AF37] outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-slate-600

StatusBadge.style: font-mono text-xs uppercase tracking-widest px-2 py-1 rounded-sm border

visual_enhancers.texture: Add a subtle noise overlay (opacity 0.03) to the main background to prevent 'digital flatness'.

layout_patterns.hero: Left-aligned declarative text. No massive hero image. The text IS the hero. Background: Subtle abstract network or map.
layout_patterns.features: Bento Grid. Mix of 1x1 (Icon + Title), 2x1 (Short description), and 2x2 (Major feature with visual) blocks.
layout_patterns.content_page: Narrow column for text (max-w-prose) to mimic a legal document. Left aligned.
layout_patterns.dashboard: Sidebar navigation (collapsible). Top bar for 'System Status' (Global/Auth). Dashboard is a 'Control Center' not a 'Feed'.

icons.style: Thin, precise lines. No filled icons unless for active states.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text is slate-300 or lighter on dark backgrounds. Avoid slate-500 for body text.
accessibility.focus: Focus rings must be Gold (#D4AF37) and sharp (no blur).
accessibility.labels: All form inputs must have visible labels or aria-labels.

universal_guidelines: DO NOT use generic AI 'rocket' or 'robot' emojis.
DO NOT use the 'System Status Monitor' bar that looks like a spaceship console.
DO NOT make everything a 'Card'. Use negative space to separate content sometimes.
Mobile First: Check every layout on 320px width mentally.
design_system.instructions_to_main_agent: Refactor the existing Tailwind config to use these colors. Replace the 'IBM Plex Mono' obsession with 'Manrope' for headings. Create a layout that feels like a 'Command Center' for a CEO, not a 'Terminal' for a hacker. Use the 'PenaltyTableSection' to show the 'Red' color (financial loss) effectively.
